[{"data":1,"prerenderedAt":-1},["ShallowReactive",2],{"$fqkVmZbfoXxrZcke-OdskWulkiSux9CmYQF1j0RO7RJg":3},{"vendor":4,"briefs":55,"guides":56,"kbArticles":69},{"id":5,"documentId":6,"slug":7,"name":8,"shortDescription":9,"description":10,"website":11,"logoUrl":12,"regions":13,"areaOfFocus":16,"links":20,"solutions":21,"membership":50,"isVanMember":54,"vanTier":51},204,"cazlq0rm394sidt5weymrtb5","altura-systems","Altura Systems","Capacity optimization and FinOps analytics for virtual infrastructure teams.","Altura Systems focuses on **optimization, analytics, and FinOps workflows** for virtual infrastructure.

## What they bring
- Capacity analytics and rightsizing recommendations
- Utilization reporting and forecasting for platform teams
- Cost governance patterns that align IT and business owners

## Typical outcomes
- Lower waste from overprovisioning
- More predictable capacity planning cycles
- Shared reporting language across infra, ops, and finance","https://example.com/altura-systems","http://10.1.5.125:8080/uploads/altura_systems_logo_3d0cba08c1.svg",[14,15],"North America","EMEA",[17,18,19],"Analytics & AI","Intelligence & Information Management","IT Infrastructure",[],[22,38],{"id":23,"documentId":24,"name":25,"slug":26,"solution_type":27,"integration_patterns":28,"licensing_model":29,"description":30,"visibility_level":31,"workflow":32,"createdAt":33,"updatedAt":34,"publishedAt":35,"locale":36,"short_description":37},231,"ih7tyfui0dgauge7mz3nq6hg","Capacity Rightsizing Intelligence","capacity-rightsizing-intelligence","monitoring","api","mixed","Turn raw infrastructure metrics into a rightsizing and planning workflow.

## What it does
- Detects chronic over and under allocation patterns
- Produces rightsizing recommendations per VM and per cluster
- Builds rolling capacity forecasts (growth, saturation risk, headroom)

## Operating model
- A baseline phase to stabilize metrics and labels
- Regular review cadence for exceptions, approvals, and follow-through

## Best for
- Platform teams facing growth uncertainty
- Organizations needing consistent governance reporting

![Solution illustration](http://10.1.5.125:8080/uploads/solution_capacity_rightsizing_intelligence_6de6f6782b.jpg)","promoted","draft","2026-02-20T09:03:04.885Z","2026-02-21T09:37:57.201Z","2026-02-21T09:37:57.252Z","en","**Rightsizing and forecasting layer** for virtual infrastructure, turning telemetry into actionable capacity and utilization decisions.",{"id":39,"documentId":40,"name":41,"slug":42,"solution_type":27,"integration_patterns":28,"licensing_model":43,"description":44,"visibility_level":45,"workflow":32,"createdAt":46,"updatedAt":47,"publishedAt":48,"locale":36,"short_description":49},234,"fux42jfbdob0b78lpdo3h5rx","Observability and Cost Governance","observability-and-cost-governance","oss","Bring operations telemetry and cost governance into a single, repeatable management loop.

## What it covers
- KPI definition: performance, availability, utilization, saturation signals
- Alerting patterns and escalation logic
- Governance checks: tagging hygiene, anomaly detection, review cadence

## Outputs
- Executive-ready reporting and trend views
- Actionable backlogs for optimization and cleanup
- Continuous improvement rhythm for platform teams

## Best for
- Teams that already collect metrics but lack governance
- Organizations that need consistent reporting across stakeholders

![Solution illustration](http://10.1.5.125:8080/uploads/solution_observability_and_cost_governance_cb3a94d188.jpg)","listed","2026-02-20T09:03:05.362Z","2026-02-21T09:37:57.761Z","2026-02-21T09:37:57.798Z","**Unified visibility plus cost-aware governance** for virtualized estates, combining operational KPIs with financial accountability.",{"tier":51,"registeredAt":52,"expiresAt":53},"regular","2026-01-08","2027-01-08",true,[],[57,63],{"id":58,"documentId":59,"slug":60,"title":61,"summary":62},132,"aprqpgnemb7nxcvoote3vplq","guide-elastic-compute-operations","Elastic Compute Operations Guide","Operational guide for adaptive placement, balancing, and contention control in compute-focused clusters.",{"id":64,"documentId":65,"slug":66,"title":67,"summary":68},130,"zytioyk7h0lzf8flbzeqr88x","guide-observability-and-optimization","Observability and Optimization Playbook","Operations playbook for **performance, utilization, and cost control**.

Defines KPIs, governance checks, and review cadences so optimization becomes a repeatable habit, not an occasional project.",[70],{"id":71,"documentId":72,"slug":73,"title":74,"type":75},93,"lvcx5pydr4higntln8gsxrzc","kb-telemetry-baseline","Building a Reliable Telemetry Baseline","howto"]
